allow: Bash(cmd.exe /c "where node && echo found || echo not found")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(x.get\('weergavenaam'\), x.get\('centroide_ll'\)\) for x in d['response']['docs']]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d['response']['docs'][0] if d['response']['docs'] else {}, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d['features'][0]['properties'] if d['features'] else {}, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); f=d.get\('features',[]\); print\(json.dumps\(f[0]['properties'],indent=2\) if f else 'no results'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f['properties']['identificatie'], f['properties']['postcode'], f['properties']['woonplaats']\) for f in d.get\('features',[]\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(p\) for p in d['paths'].keys\(\)]")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) for path in ['/api/v5/PandEnergielabel/AdresseerbaarObject/{adresseerbaarObjectId}', '/api/v5/PandEnergielabel/Adres']: print\(f'\\n=== {path} ==='\) print\(json.dumps\(d['paths'][path], indent=2\)\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\(json.dumps\(d['components']['schemas']['PandEnergielabelV5'], indent=2\)\) print\(\) sec = d['components'].get\('securitySchemes', {}\) print\(json.dumps\(sec, indent=2\)\) ")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d[0] if d else {},indent=2\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const http = require\('http'\); http.get\('http://localhost:3000', res => { console.log\('Status:', res.statusCode\); res.on\('data', \(\) => {}\); }\).on\('error', e => console.log\('Error:', e.message\)\)")
